experiments_kept.hypothesis: Port categorized links from old site and add calendar widget with ICS proxy
experiments_kept.change_summary: Added LinkSection type, populated 7 day configs with ~24 categorized links (Socials, Sports, Betting, Fantasy, Professional), built CalendarWidget with ical.js and Vercel API proxy, localStorage caching with 15min TTL, 2 new test files (148 lines)
experiments_kept.notes: ceo:keep score_delta=+0.0000 precheck=override_operational agents_spawned=R,S,B pr_status=open_for_review hypothesis_type=code execution_artifacts=na e2e=pass backlog_cleared=partial

backlog_remaining: **Enable GitHub Pages in repository settings**: Go to the repository's Settings > Pages > Source and select "GitHub Actions". The deploy workflow will be committed in Phase 1 but Pages must be manually enabled for deploys to work.
**Default weather location**: The code uses browser geolocation with a fallback to London (51.51, -0.13). Update `src/config/defaults.ts` with your preferred default location coordinates.

**Personalize quick links**: Phase 2 and 6 populate quick links with sensible defaults (common productivity tools, news sites, etc.). Edit each day's config file in `src/config/days/` to reflect your actual bookmarks.

Add content-aware calendar adaptation: use calendar events to influence which link sections are shown (e.g., sports links promoted on game days, professional links promoted on meeting-heavy days). Stretch goal from Issue #2.
